summary: Tested Create Congrats Card feature e2e. All features working correctly: (1) My Account page shows QUICK ACTIONS grid with 'Create Congrats Card' tile positioned next to 'My Digital Card', (2) More page NO LONGER has QUICK ACTIONS section (removed), (3) More > Templates & Branding shows 'Congrats Cards' menu item, (4) Create form at /settings/create-congrats has all fields working, (5) Backend APIs working (create, get, track, history), (6) Share URLs use production domain https://app.imosapp.com, (7) All web share functions use window.open (not Linking.openURL).

minor.issue: Returns 405 Method Not Allowed on My Account page - may affect user data refresh

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed congrats cards during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Create Congrats Card features verified working: (1) Quick Actions grid on My Account page includes 'Create Congrats Card' tile at position 2 (after My Digital Card), (2) QUICK ACTIONS removed from More page, (3) Templates & Branding section in More has 'Congrats Cards' item for template customization, (4) Create form at /settings/create-congrats has CUSTOMER PHOTO, CUSTOMER NAME, CUSTOMER PHONE (optional), CUSTOM MESSAGE (optional), and Create & Share Card button, (5) Backend POST /api/congrats/create works with multipart form data, (6) Share URLs use production domain https://app.imosapp.com/congrats/{card_id}, (7) All share buttons use window.open on web for Facebook, Twitter, SMS, Email, Download, View Card.
